short_hint_en: The brightest round object in the sky.
short_hint_zh: 天空中最明亮的圆形目标。
learning_text_en: The Moon is bright and close compared with most night sky objects. That makes it a good first target for beginner observers.
learning_text_zh: 月球比大多数夜空目标更近、更亮，所以很适合新手第一次观测。

short_hint_en: Look toward the northern part of the sky.
learning_text_en: Polaris is called the North Star because it appears close to the north celestial pole. It can help people find north.
learning_text_zh: 北极星看起来靠近北天极，因此常被用来帮助判断北方。

short_hint_en: Find a very bright blue-white star.
short_hint_zh: 寻找一颗非常明亮的蓝白色恒星。
learning_text_en: Sirius is one of the brightest stars in Earth's night sky. Bright stars are easier targets for early telescope practice.
learning_text_zh: 天狼星是地球夜空中最亮的恒星之一，适合早期观测练习。

short_hint_en: A reddish planet near the lower sky.
short_hint_zh: 低空附近的红橙色行星。
learning_text_en: Mars can look small through a beginner telescope. A steady mount helps keep planet details from shaking.
learning_text_zh: 火星在入门望远镜里可能看起来很小，稳定支架能减少行星图像抖动。

short_hint_en: A bright planet that needs a steady view.
short_hint_zh: 一颗明亮、需要稳定视野的行星。
learning_text_en: Jupiter is the largest planet in the Solar System. Planet observation works better when the telescope is stable.
learning_text_zh: 木星是太阳系最大的行星。观测行星时，望远镜越稳定越容易看清。

short_hint_en: Look for a reddish star in Orion.
short_hint_zh: 在猎户座方向寻找偏红的恒星。
learning_text_en: Betelgeuse is a red supergiant in Orion. Star color can tell us something about temperature.
learning_text_zh: 参宿四是猎户座中的红超巨星。恒星颜色能帮助我们理解它的温度。

short_hint_en: A dim cloud-like target. It needs more light.
short_hint_zh: 像云雾一样的暗目标，需要更强集光能力。
learning_text_en: The Orion Nebula is a cloud of gas and dust where new stars can form.
learning_text_zh: 猎户座大星云是由气体和尘埃组成的云，新恒星可能在其中形成。

short_hint_en: A faint galaxy. High magnification will not solve low light.
short_hint_zh: 暗淡的星系。单纯提高倍率不能解决集光不足。
learning_text_en: Andromeda is the nearest large galaxy to the Milky Way, but it looks faint because it is extremely far away.
learning_text_zh: 仙女座是离银河系最近的大星系，但距离极远，所以看起来很暗。

short_hint_zh: 寻找一颗明亮的橙色恒星。
learning_text_en: Arcturus is an orange giant - follow the arc of the Big Dipper's handle to find it. Its color tells you it is cooler than white stars.
learning_text_zh: 大角星是一颗橙巨星——沿着北斗七星斗柄的弧线就能找到它。橙色说明它比白色恒星温度更低。

short_hint_en: Find a brilliant star very low in the south.
short_hint_zh: 在南方极低的天空寻找一颗灿烂的恒星。
learning_text_en: Canopus is the second-brightest star in the night sky. From northern latitudes it hugs the southern horizon - low targets suffer the most from atmospheric turbulence.
learning_text_zh: 老人星是夜空中第二亮的恒星。在北半球它紧贴南方地平线——低空目标受大气扰动影响最大。

short_hint_en: Find the nearest bright star system.
short_hint_zh: 寻找离我们最近的明亮恒星系统。
learning_text_en: Alpha Centauri is the closest star SYSTEM to the Sun - actually three stars orbiting together. Its warm yellow light resembles our own Sun's.
learning_text_zh: 南门二是离太阳最近的恒星系统——其实是三颗互相绕转的恒星。它温暖的黄色光芒与太阳很相似。

short_hint_en: Find a very faint red dwarf - a serious challenge.
short_hint_zh: 寻找一颗极暗的红矮星——这是真正的挑战。
learning_text_en: Proxima Centauri is the closest single star to the Sun, yet it is invisible to the naked eye - red dwarfs are tiny and dim. Closeness does not mean brightness.
learning_text_zh: 比邻星是离太阳最近的恒星，却完全无法用肉眼看见——红矮星又小又暗。离得近不等于看得亮。
